AuthorDetails.Name: Adriano Fabri
AuthorDetails.Description: A full stack developer with a particular focus on .NET, Angular and NodeJS development.

Description: Redis connector for Umbraco 15/16/17 (.NET 9/10). Auto-composes StackExchange.Redis distributed cache, persists ASP.NET Core Data Protection keys to Redis (default key: AF.Umbraco.Redis.Connector:_DataProtectionKeys), performs startup fail-fast connectivity validation, and includes optional smoke endpoints.
Title: AF Umbraco Redis Connector
